title: Email Vote Buttons that Update Column

posts.author: chrisreeves (Chris Reeves)
posts.cookedHtml:
Gmail automations - is it possible to include voting buttons in an automated email that when clicked, would then update a column in my board?

I.e., I am emailing team members to see who can attend certain events. I want yes or no buttons that could then populate a column to tell me who is coming. (Not all teammates are members on my board - only leadership)
